# Azeth Agent Commerce Demo

> Two AI agents discover, pay, and rate each other using Azeth trust infrastructure.

This demo shows the complete machine economy loop on Base Sepolia:

1. Agent A ("WeatherOracle") creates a smart account and registers as a weather data service
2. Agent B ("DataAnalyst") discovers the service, checks reputation, pays via x402, and rates the provider

## What This Demonstrates

- ERC-4337 smart account creation via AzethKit
- ERC-8004 trust registry: service publishing and discovery
- x402 payments: HTTP-native machine-to-machine commerce
- On-chain reputation: payment-gated feedback that builds trust over time

## Key Insight: Providers Need Smart Accounts

An EOA-only provider can receive payments but cannot be discovered, rated, or build reputation. Azeth smart accounts make providers first-class participants in the machine economy.

## Quick Start

```bash
git clone https://github.com/azeth-protocol/agent-commerce-demo.git
cd agent-commerce-demo
npm install
cp .env.example .env
# Add two different private keys
npm run demo
```

## Related

- Azeth MCP Server: npx @azeth/mcp-server (32 tools for AI agents)
- Azeth SDK: npm install @azeth/sdk
- Agent Starter Template: https://github.com/azeth-protocol/agent-starter
- Website: https://azeth.ai
